email.subject: Exploring Options for Enhanced Patient Care with ZENPEP
email.email_body:
Dear Dr. Hammerstrand,

I hope this message finds you well. As a dedicated hematology/oncology specialist in Needham, your commitment to patient care is truly commendable. I wanted to reach out to discuss how ZENPEP might offer additional benefits for your patients currently on pancreatic enzyme replacement therapy.

ZENPEP's non-enteric-coated microsphere formulation can provide enhanced tolerability, which your colleague, Dr. Michael Chen, has noted in his recent experience switching patients from CREON. Additionally, with five available strengths ranging from 3K to 40K lipase units, ZENPEP offers flexible titration options that can be tailored to your patients' specific needs.

I would be delighted to provide more information about the APEX trial data or discuss how our ZenConnect co-pay program could support your patients with affordable access. Please let me know a convenient time for us to connect.

Warm regards,

[Your Name]
[Your Contact Information]

ZenConnect co-pay program for affordable access

email.subject: Exploring ZENPEP for Enhanced EPI Management in Your Practice
email.email_body:
Dear Dr. Kawayeh,

I hope this message finds you well. As a dedicated gastroenterologist in Rialto, your commitment to providing optimal care for your patients with exocrine pancreatic insufficiency (EPI) is truly commendable. I wanted to share some insights on how ZENPEP could further support your treatment approach.

Given your current experience with CREON and recent prescriptions, ZENPEP offers a unique non-enteric-coated microsphere formulation, allowing for potentially improved digestion and absorption. Additionally, with five different strengths ranging from 3K to 40K lipase units, ZENPEP provides the flexibility needed for precise titration tailored to each patient's needs.

I’d also like to highlight the ZenConnect co-pay program, which can significantly reduce costs for your commercially insured patients. If you're interested, I can provide detailed APEX trial data to support your decision-making. It may also be beneficial to connect with Dr. James Wilson, who has observed strong results with ZENPEP in his practice.

Please let me know if you’d like to discuss this further or if I can arrange a conversation with Dr. Wilson. Looking forward to supporting your practice and patients.

ZenConnect co-pay program for cost-effective patient care
